synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0923 Important: Oracle Linux 9 golang security update
description:
[1.25.5-2]
- Rebase to rhel-9-main
- Related: RHEL-139366

[1.25.5-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.5 (fips-1)
- Resolves: RHEL-139366

[1.25.3-2]
- Cleanup lib/ ownership
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0923

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0923.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
go-toolset-1.25.5-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
golang-1.25.5-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.5-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
golang-docs-1.25.5-2.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-misc-1.25.5-2.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-race-1.25.5-2.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
golang-src-1.25.5-2.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-tests-1.25.5-2.el9_7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
go-toolset-1.25.5-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
golang-1.25.5-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.5-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
golang-docs-1.25.5-2.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-misc-1.25.5-2.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-race-1.25.5-2.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
golang-src-1.25.5-2.el9_7.noarch.rpm
golang-tests-1.25.5-2.el9_7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/golang-1.25.5-2.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-61729




Description of changes:

[1.25.5-2]
- Rebase to rhel-9-main
- Related: RHEL-139366

[1.25.5-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.5 (fips-1)
- Resolves: RHEL-139366

[1.25.3-2]
- Cleanup lib/ ownership
